caption: A woman with long dark hair is seen in a medium close-up shot, wearing a striped shirt and black over-ear headphones. She is positioned in front of a light-colored wall and a pale yellow curtain. The text "Nancy Ramya" appears in the bottom left corner of each scene. Throughout the sequence, the woman is speaking, with her facial expressions and mouth movements shifting as she talks. In the first frame, she slightly lifts her right hand toward her chest. As the sequence progresses, she maintains her focus forward, continuing to speak with varying expressions of concentration and engagement. The background and her clothing remain constant, while the only movement is her speaking and the subtle shift of her head and facial muscles.
